text:
There was an orphaned kitten who lived for cookies. Every evening the kitten would sneak back home, pawing at the the last piece of cookies on the door stop. It never hesitated to lick its favorite cookie mold. One day, though, during a late-night raid on the potluck muffins, the cat got fleas. It scratched itself so much that the cookies got crumbs all over the'twas a distress bakerie!

The cat decided it must have ants in its fur. You think? So it hid from morning till night. That night there was thunder. The lightning hit an ant hill. You think ants like fire?

The little guys swarmed the poor thing. The cat had a thousand bites. They ate up all the ant stuff; that's what the scratches were from. It's just fur ants. They're no longer interested. The cat will get allergies.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
